name: Killer Salza (Hot,hot,hot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chile pequins for 3 to 4 hours in vinegar until fully submerged; drain.
2. In a blender, combine the garlic, cumin, oregano, salt, and tomato juice. Blend until smooth.
3. Let the mixture sit in the refrigerator to cool before using.
